name: infiniband
explanation: The Infiniband check has no required configuration fields and no network endpoint. It walks `/sys/class/infiniband` on the Agent host (or `/host/sys/class/infiniband` when running containerised), enumerates IB devices and ports, and reads counter/hw_counter/status sysfs files directly. There is no host/port/URL/credential to discover - presence of the `/sys/class/infiniband` directory with at least one device is the trigger. This is the same shape as btrfs: a host-local kernel-surface check, pattern H/L analogue with no binary or network involved. Auto-config can emit the integration with default-empty instances on any Agent host where the sysfs path exists.
notes: Mirrors btrfs pattern: generic / other because the discovery signal is host-local presence of a kernel sysfs hierarchy. The Agent must have read access to /sys/class/infiniband (containerised deployments mount /host/sys, which the check already handles).
